mapper.insert: insert into wf_historic_process_instance (id, process_id, state, creator, create_time, end_time, parent_id, expire_time, variable) values (#{id}, #{processId}, #{state}, #{creator}, #{createTime}, #{endTime}, #{parentId}, #{expireTime}, #{variable})
mapper.select: select o.id, o.process_id, o.state, o.priority, o.creator, o.create_time, o.end_time, o.parent_id, o.expire_time, o.variable from wf_historic_process_instance o where id = #{instanceId}
